headline: AI-Fueled Demand Amid Supply Strains Might Change The Case For Investing In Arista Networks (ANET)
summary: In early May 2026, Arista Networks reported first-quarter revenue of US$2,709 million and net income of US$1,022.9 million, while guiding second-quarter 2026 revenue to approximately US$2.8 billion amid ongoing supply chain constraints and margin pressure. At the same time, Arista highlighted accelerating AI-driven demand and new AI-focused networking products such as its XPO high-density optics and 7800 universal AI spine, reinforcing its role at the core of next-generation data center...

headline: CSCO: The $9 Billion AI Breakout Investors Missed
summary: Cisco Systems (NASDAQ: CSCO) shares surged as much as 17% in post-market trading following the Q3 2026 release, though the rally was not merely a reaction to the headline numbers. While revenue hit $15.84 billion, surpassing the $15.56 billion consensus, and non-GAAP EPS of $1.06 cleared expectations, the real catalyst was a massive upward revision in the company's full-year outlook. headline: Six Firms Just Piled Into Cisco: Wall Street Rushes to Hike Price Targets After 20% Earnings Pop
summary: Six major Wall Street firms hiked their price targets on Cisco Systems (NASDAQ:CSCO) on May 14, following a blowout fiscal Q3 2026 report that sent shares surging roughly 19% after the close. headline: Cisco Is Up 17% Today: Is It Outperforming Other Networking Stocks Like Hewlett Packard Enterprise and Arista Networks?
